summary: Comprehensive testing of admin panel user management and setup wizard. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI loads correctly. Both key fixes verified: (1) GET /api/admin/hierarchy/users no longer crashes with 500 error, (2) Setup wizard keyboard input works without dismissing.

ui_bugs.issue: Small touch target (4px padding) makes it difficult for automated testing to click. Manual clicks work fine.

frontend_tests.users_page_loads: PASSED - Shows users grouped by role (Super Admin, Admin, Manager)
frontend_tests.user_detail_page_loads: PASSED - Shows role badge, Impersonate User, Manage Permissions buttons
frontend_tests.role_change_modal_opens: PASSED - Shows Sales Rep, Account Manager, Org Admin options
frontend_tests.role_change_api_works: PASSED - Verified via direct API call
frontend_tests.setup_wizard_keyboard_input: PASSED - Typed 'Test Org' character by character without keyboard dismissing

verified_fixes: GET /api/admin/hierarchy/users - safe_objectid() fix prevents 500 error on invalid ObjectIds like 'org_001'
Setup wizard - useMemo on styles prevents component recreation on every keystroke (keyboard bug fixed)
action_items: Consider increasing touch target size for pencil icon (currently 4px padding) to improve usability
seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix 'Test Role Change User' and 'testuser_' during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel APIs working. Role change modal opens correctly and API works. Setup wizard keyboard issue is fixed. The pencil icon click has small touch target but works with workaround.
